name: Yellow Handkerchief
overview: Sang-min wants success in life, and in pursuit of success, he abandons his ten-year relationship with Ja-yeong to marry his boss’ daughter, Min-ju. Ja-yeong finds herself pregnant and raising a child alone. When Sang-min finds out, the battle over custody of child begins. This drama became a number one hit and captured more than 30% of viewers during its broadcast while unraveling the mysteries of waiting, forgiveness and above all - the value of love.

trailers.title: 연정훈 한가인의 가슴 설렌 첫 만남 '노란 손수건'(2003) [세대공감토요일: 별들의고향]
